Got lines={len(lines)}, path={path!r}, is_abs={ab}, ends_in_md={end}, exists={ex}. Skill rule: final message MUST be exactly one line, the absolute path to corpus-summary.md.'); sys.exit(0 if ok else 1)" {response_file}
